mapper.select: select u.user_id as userId, u.user_name as userName, u.nick_name as nickName from sys_user u inner join exam_teaching_research_office_user r on r.user_id = u.user_id where r.teaching_research_office_id = #{officeId}
mapper.insert:
insert into exam_teaching_research_office_user (teaching_research_office_id, user_id, create_time) values
(#{officeId}, #{uid}, now())
